text.body:
Daddy-O! You made it through your entire set in the The School of Jazz! You hear that? The entire club is applauding you for your work!

So what’s next? If you haven’t already, schedule a debrief with your TA. Make sure you’ve completed any labs and sent them along for review.

You can even schedule shadow sessions with others on your team!

When you’re ready, move on to the next course, The School of Pop.
